name: Rock Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the baking powder into the flour and add the salt.
2. Sieve the flour, mixed spice, and grated nutmeg into a bowl.
3. Clean the currants by placing them in a sieve with some flour, then rubbing well before brushing off excess flour.
4. Rub the fat (margarine) into the flour until it resembles fine breadcrumbs.
5. Add the sugar, dried fruit (currants), and candied peel to the mixture.
6. Beat the egg in a basin and add it to the dry ingredients using a fork. A drop of milk may be needed.
7. Mix all the ingredients together well so that they are combined but still fairly firm and dry.
8. Grease the tin.
9. Place small heaps of the mixture onto the prepared baking tin and bake for 15 minutes in a hot oven (450°F, mark 8).
